Story: The focus here is mainly on internal support for colleagues. Maintaining software and hardware. Troubleshooting and resolving in-depth technical problems. Configuring firewalls and routers. Managing Windows Server environments. Managing network environments. Creating scripts for automation or recurring  issues. Performance monitoring and tweaking on everything related to network and Windows server infrastructure. Backup management. Maintaining technical documentation and platforms for management.

This role is a continuation of the previous one, but with a focus on Enterprise clients. Within the company, designated as a coordinator for the Network Experts team. Technical in-depth network and system troubleshooting. Installing and configuring firewalls. Manage Intune environments. Maintaining server and network infrastructure. Implementing security-related adjustments. Supporting colleagues. Working with other departments to develop proposals for new implementations. Drafting documentation and procedures.
The initial experiences in the IT world. First-line servicedesk support. Repairs of various hardware. Proactively updating, maintaining software an documentation.

Onsite implementation of equipment or services (printers, firewalls, servers,...) in the BeNeLux and France, the SME world. Carrying out IT maintenance on-site at customers' premises. In case of technical urgent intervention from escalations perfom onsite repairs. Due to the trend of Onprem to Cloud, migrations to the cloud, with a focus on Microsoft 365.
